---
name: test-coverage
description:
  Evaluates the effectiveness and breadth of test cases in the codebase.
---

# Test Coverage Skill
This skill analyzes the test suite to evaluate the effectiveness and breadth of test cases. It ensures that the tests cover various scenarios and edge cases.

## Features
- Analyzes the test suite for completeness.
- Identifies missing edge case tests.
- Highlights redundant or ineffective tests.

## Output format
- A detailed report showing:
  - Test case coverage by functionality.
  - Missing edge cases and scenarios.
  - Suggestions for improving test effectiveness.

## Usage
Invoke this skill to:
- Ensure the test suite is comprehensive.
- Identify gaps in test scenarios.
- Optimize the test suite for better reliability.
